title: On Holding AG (ONON) Stock Forecast and Analyst Predictions
text: On Holding (ONON) has a consensus Strong Buy rating among 19 Wall Street analysts based on 17 Buy and 2 Hold recommendations assigned in the last three months. On Holding AG's 12-month average price target is $56.67, with the company having 71.57% upside potential based on analysts' average price target. Bank of America called the Swiss shoemaker a home run, and both Bank of America and UBS reiterated Buy ratings and lifted price targets. UBS raised its price target to $73 per share, up from $65 previously, implying about 40% upside. Bernstein analyst Aneesha Sherman maintained a Buy rating with price target of $70.00. Not all analysts were bullish, with Goldman Sachs' Richard Edwards maintaining a Hold rating with price target of $57.00.
